message:
fix(extras): replace unwrap with unwrap_or in gradient stop sampling (bd-3euyw)

Replace .unwrap() with .unwrap_or(white) in sample_fast() and
sample_fast_oklab() for consistency with the linear sampling methods
that already use this pattern. While the empty check above makes the
unwrap technically safe, unwrap_or is more robust against future
refactoring.

Also fix formatting in concurrent agent changes (scrollbar, glyph_atlas).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -46,6 +46,7 @@ serde_json = "1.0.145"
 serde = { version = "1.0.227", features = ["derive"] }
 unicode-width = "0.2.2"
 unicode-segmentation = "1.12.0"
+web-time = "1.1.0"
 
 [features]
 debug-render = []
